title: Investigate, identify, and fix admin deposit page missing records and wrong status display
issue_description: Investigate an issue where the admin deposit page may not be showing all deposits and may not correctly display whether deposits are pending or completed. Systems involved may include AlgonneyPay, treasury events, algonney.com backend, database queries, admin API endpoints, and frontend table/status mapping. Work step by step with one and only one step per cycle. First investigate the full deposit data path end-to-end, then identify and prove the exact root cause, then propose and implement the fix, and finally validate that the page shows all deposits correctly and displays the correct pending/completed status. Changes are allowed only after the issue is clearly proven. Prefer read-only investigation first, then move to fix mode only when the root cause is confirmed. Stop only when the issue is fully resolved, blocked, or requires explicit human approval for a risky action.
issue_seed_prompt: Investigate, identify, and fix admin deposit page missing records and wrong status display
